description: Location of an object relative to another, with or without respect to directional order.

values.label: Affixed
values.description: Attached to another element in a fixed position

values.label: Top
values.description: Top position relative to a reference element

values.label: Bottom
values.description: Bottom position relative to a reference element

values.label: Start
values.description: Start position (left in LTR, right in RTL)

values.label: End
values.description: End position (right in LTR, left in RTL)

values.label: Start edge
values.description: Outer boundary at the start (left in LTR, right in RTL)

values.label: End edge
values.description: Outer boundary at the end (right in LTR, left in RTL)
